CREATE TABLE demo_publication (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content VARCHAR(255), owner VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE demo_subscription (id INT PRIMARY KEY, publication_id INT, local_owner VARCHAR(50), FOREIGN KEY (publication_id) REFERENCES demo_publication(id));
INSERT INTO demo_publication (id, content, owner) VALUES (1, 'Sample Content', 'app_owner');
INSERT INTO demo_publication (id, content, owner) VALUES (2, 'Another Sample Content', 'app_owner');
DB.DBA.REPL_SUBSCRIBE ('demo-srv', (SELECT id FROM demo_publication WHERE content = 'Sample Content'), 'dav_owner', 'dav', 'demo', 'demo');
DB.DBA.REPL_SUBSCRIBE ('demo-srv', (SELECT id FROM demo_publication WHERE owner = 'app_owner' AND content LIKE '%Sample%'), 'dav_owner', 'dav', 'demo', 'demo');
DB.DBA.REPL_SUBSCRIBE ('demo-srv', 'demo-publication', (SELECT owner FROM demo_publication WHERE id = 1), 'dav', 'demo', 'demo');
INSERT INTO demo_subscription (id, publication_id, local_owner) SELECT 1, id, 'local_owner' FROM demo_publication WHERE content = 'Another Sample Content';
DB.DBA.REPL_SUBSCRIBE ('demo-srv', 'demo-publication', 'dav', 'dav', (SELECT owner FROM demo_publication WHERE id = 2), 'demo');
DB.DBA.REPL_SUBSCRIBE ('demo-srv', 'demo-publication', 'dav', 'dav', 'demo', (SELECT owner FROM demo_publication ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1));
